content:
[Intro]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] (Guitar Only)

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, just a little bit dangerous[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]C#m[/ch]
You pack your bag, you take control[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
You're moving into my heart and into my soul[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C#m[/ch]
Get out of my way, get out of my sight[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B[/ch]
I won't be walking on thin ice to get through the night[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
Hey, where's your work? What's your game?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
I know your business but I don't know your name[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                          [ch]B[/ch]
Hold on tight, you know she's a little bit dangerous[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C#m[/ch]
She's got what it takes to make ends meet[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
The eyes of a lover that hit like heat[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]E[/ch]
You know she's a little bit dangerous[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]
You turn around, so hot and dry[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
You're hiding under a halo, your mouth is alive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C#m[/ch]
Get out of my way, get out of my sight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
I'm not attracted to go-go deeper tonight[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
Hey, what's your word? What's your game?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
I know your business but I don't know your name[/tab]

[tab]                            [ch]E[/ch]

[tab]                      [ch]B[/ch]
